author: rajatsharma
name: SOTA Stack (int7 + LZMA)
blurb: All proven SOTA techniques (XSA-all, BigramHash 3072x112, SmearGate, LeakyReLU^2, 11L 3xMLP, partial RoPE, LN scale, EMA 0.997, Late QAT, int7 GPTQ-lite + LZMA-9, sliding eval stride=64, Muon WD 0.04) ported into the clean baseline. 1.1711 BPB on 8xH100 SXM in 600s, 14.84 MB artifact.
technique_summary: XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 + SmearGate + LeakyReLU^2 3xMLP + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + Late QAT + int7 GPTQ-lite + LZMA-9 + Sliding eval + Muon WD
